subcodes.first_line: O true friends! When the Sun of Reality shone forth from the horizon of the placeless realm upon the world of being with penetrating rays [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان راستان شمس حقیقت چون از افق لامکان بر جهان امکان باشعه ساطعه اشراق
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @symbolism, @firmness in the Covenant
